---
title: "A first note"
date: "2026-07-08"
description: "Placeholder — replace or delete me. This exists only so the Writing list has something to show."
---

This is a starter post so the *Writing* page isn't empty. Delete this file
(`posts/welcome.qmd`) or overwrite it with your own first piece.

To add a post, drop a new `.qmd` file in `posts/` with a `title`, `date`, and short
`description` in the front matter. That's the whole workflow — write Markdown, it
appears in the list.
